bead.title: feat: implement CDC cursor persistence (_cdc_cursors table)
bead.description: CONTRACT-006 §Cursor semantics requires a _cdc_cursors table that persists the last emitted audit_id per sink. Without this, CDC producers cannot resume from a stable offset after restart. Blocker: no persistent storage adapter is wired into axon-audit yet (requires axon-storage or axon-server integration). Implement: CdcCursorStore trait with get/set per (sink_name, collection) key; MemoryCursorStore for tests; wire into replay path.
